title: 中考六选五 11: The Value of Boredom
passage:
Many teenagers dislike boredom. Whenever they have a few free minutes, they quickly take out their phones. 1. ______ But boredom is not always something we should escape from immediately.

When the mind is not filled with outside information, it has space to wander. This may sound useless, but it can lead to new ideas. 2. ______ Some creative thoughts appear when people are walking, waiting or simply doing nothing.

Boredom can also show us what we truly care about. If students are always entertained, they may never ask themselves what they really want to do. 3. ______ A quiet moment can make hidden interests easier to notice.

However, boredom is only useful when we face it properly. If we just complain or become lazy, little will happen. 4. ______ Students can use boring moments to think, plan or observe the world around them.

This does not mean phones and entertainment are bad. The problem is using them every time silence appears. 5. ______ Sometimes, leaving the mind alone for a while is exactly what it needs.

questions.label: Questions 1-5 - Sentence Insertion
questions.instruction: Choose the best sentence from A-F for each blank in the passage. There is one extra sentence you do not need.

choices.text: They may feel uncomfortable when there is nothing exciting to do.
The brain often connects ideas when it is not forced to focus on one task.
Instead, they need to turn empty time into thinking time.
Constant entertainment can cover up these questions.
We should give ourselves some screen-free moments.
Boredom is useful only when students have no homework.
